hooks.command: repo=${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}; until [ -x "$repo/xtask/agent-hook" ]; do [ "$repo" != / ] || { printf 'error: cannot find xtask/agent-hook\n' >&2; exit 1; }; repo=${repo%/*}; [ -n "$repo" ] || repo=/; done; exec "$repo/xtask/agent-hook" pre-bash

repo=${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}; until [ -x "$repo/xtask/agent-hook" ]; do [ "$repo" != / ] || { printf 'error: cannot find xtask/agent-hook\n' >&2; exit 1; }; repo=${repo%/*}; [ -n "$repo" ] || repo=/; done; exec "$repo/xtask/agent-hook" post-edit
